appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for Rust Tests (cargo test) and E2E SSH Tests surfaces with isolation rules, boundaries, and test naming conventions

notes: All 16 Pi provider assertions passed. 4 flow validator subagents were spawned: 3 for unit tests (protocol-transport, event-mapping, sessions-detection) running in parallel, and 1 for E2E SSH tests running sequentially. Total unit tests: ~52 across all groups. E2E tests validated against real Pi instance on gvps (v0.66.1) using both native RPC and ACP transports.
